title: Simple Voice Chat Player Names
description: Shows the names of players currently speaking in your Simple Voice Chat group.
body:
**Simple Voice Chat Player Names**

This mod adds an overlay that shows the names of players who are currently speaking in your [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) group.

Perfect for keeping track of who's talking during multiplayer sessions or large group calls — no more guessing who’s speaking!

Tldr: **Group Voice Chat Name Display**
